forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to reset the password
forgotPassword.successMessage: We've sent a password reset code to

auth.terms: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.termsEmails: , and to receive periodic emails with updates.

newOrg.title: Create a new organization
newOrg.description: Organizations are a way to group your branches together. Each organization can be configured with different team members and billing settings.
newOrg.nameHint: What's the name of your company or team? You can change this later.
newOrg.planHint: Which plan fits your organization's needs best?

invite.title: Invite team members
invite.ssoDescription: Enforce login via your company identity provider for added security and access control. Available on Team plan and above.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect external tools and services to enhance your workflow.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Receive real-time alerts and notifications directly in your Slack channels.

github.name: GitHub
github.description: Link repositories to branches and automate deployment workflows.

zapier.name: Zapier
zapier.description: Connect with thousands of apps and automate repetitive tasks.

jira.name: Jira
jira.description: Sync issues and track supplier-related tasks across your team.

hubspot.name: HubSpot
hubspot.description: Bring supplier contacts and deal data into your CRM pipeline.

datadog.name: Datadog
datadog.description: Monitor performance metrics and activity logs across all branches.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitle: Monitor your organization's resource consumption this billing cycle.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription plan and payment details.

team.name: Team
team.description: For growing teams with advanced needs.

settings.title: Organization Settings
settings.orgNameDescription: This is your organization's display name across the platform.
settings.orgSlugDescription: Used in URLs and API references. Changing this will update all existing links.
settings.deleteOrgDescription: Permanently delete this organization and all associated branches, members, and data. This action cannot be undone.

branchOverview.pausedDescription: All data, including records, documents, and workflow history, remains safe. You can resume this branch from the dashboard within {{days}} days (until {{deadline}}). After that, this branch will not be resumable, but data will still be available for download.
branchOverview.preventPauses: To prevent future pauses, consider upgrading to Pro.

suppliers.label: Supplier Data
suppliers.description: View and manage your supplier records, profiles, and performance metrics.

query.label: Query Builder
query.description: Build custom queries to filter and explore your supplier database.

contacts.label: Contacts
contacts.description: Manage contacts associated with your suppliers and partners.

access.label: Access Control
access.description: Configure roles and permissions for team members within this branch.

documents.label: Documents
documents.description: Store and manage contracts, certificates, and compliance documents.

automations.label: Automations
automations.description: Set up automated workflows to streamline supplier onboarding and reviews.

activity.label: Activity Feed
activity.description: Track all actions and changes made within this branch.

insights.label: Insights
insights.description: AI-powered recommendations and supplier risk signals.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: Visualise supplier performance trends and KPIs over time.

logs.label: Logs
logs.description: Detailed audit logs for all system and user events in this branch.

integrations.label: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external tools and data sources to this branch.

settings.label: Branch Settings
settings.description: Configure branch-level preferences, environments, and danger zone actions.
